name: holistic
description: Cross-agent, cross-platform memory for AI coding work
author: lweis

scripts.build: find src -name '*.ts' -exec sed -i 's/from "\(.*\)\.ts"/from "\1.js"/g' {} \; && tsc && find src -name '*.ts' -exec sed -i 's/from "\(.*\)\.js"/from "\1.ts"/g' {} \;
scripts.build:win: powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -Filter *.ts | ForEach-Object { (Get-Content $_.FullName) -replace 'from \"(.+)\\.ts\"', 'from \"$1.js\"' | Set-Content $_.FullName }" && tsc && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path src -Recurse -Filter *.ts | ForEach-Object { (Get-Content $_.FullName) -replace 'from \"(.+)\\.js\"', 'from \"$1.ts\"' | Set-Content $_.FullName }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
